title: MCP Architecture, Negotiation, and Trust Boundaries · Threat Case: Capabilities
summary: Trace one tool call across host, client, server, and external system. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext capabilities increment in an MCP architecture and threat-boundary diagram. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Advertise and negotiate only implemented protocol capabilities.
Trace initialization, capability negotiation, requests, responses, notifications, and errors.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
